results.title: BlackRock World Mining Fund | A2
excerpts:
Section Title: BlackRock World Mining Fund > Overview > Investment Approach
Content:
The World Mining Fund seeks to maximise total return. The Fund invests globally at least 70% of its total assets in the equity securities of mining and metals companies whose predominant economic activity is the production of base metals and industrial minerals such as iron ore and coal. The Fund may also hold the equity securities of companies whose predominant economic activity is in gold or other precious metal or mineral mining. The Fund does not hold physical gold or metal.

Section Title: BlackRock World Mining Fund > Overview > Investment Objective
Content:
The World Mining Fund seeks to maximise total return. The Fund invests globally at least 70% of its total assets in the equity securities of mining and metals companies whose predominant economic activity is the production of base metals and industrial minerals such as iron ore and coal. The Fund may also hold the equity securities of companies whose predominant economic activity is in gold or other precious metal or mineral mining. The Fund does not hold physical gold or metal.
Diversified portfolio of precious mining equities
Active portfolio management approach
Bottom-up approach to portfolio construction coupled with a top-down subsector overlay
Diversified global portfolio
Invests in equities, not directly in hard commodities
Experienced team with extensive market knowledge
Managed by BlackRock's highly regarded Natural Resources team
Get insights
